center.name: Busuanga, Palawan
center.summary: Busuanga, Palawan是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Spot-throated flameback、Red-headed flameback，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is endemic to the Philippines only being found in the region of Palawan in the islands of Balabac, mainland Palawan, Busuanga and Calamian

birds.label: 分布于
